loop1.title: Cumulative Energy
loop1.note: Showing cumulative active/reactive energy (kWh/kVArh) for this month — panel nameplate capacity is unknown, so target/capacity/marker are blank.

loop1.title: Energy Consumption Trend
loop1.note: Showing per-feeder energy trends (UPS, BPDB, HHF) — panel-level aggregate energy is not directly measured; values are derived from member meters.

loop1.title: Today live power analysis
loop1.note: Showing live apparent power and active/reactive power from panel members; rated capacity and peak markers are omitted because the asset's nameplate rating is unknown and no windowed-peak reducer exists.

loop1.title: Daily Power Demand by Feeder
loop1.note: Showing worst peak power and load factor from member feeders; HHF series is honest-blanked as no HHF feeders exist on this panel.
